message:
chore(engine): sync beads issue tracker — new/updated items for FRX-11/15/16/18/19/20 tracks

Update beads issue metadata to reflect new work items across adversarial
coevolution (FRX-18), counterfactual replay and stability scanning
(FRX-19), test evidence integration (FRX-20), swarm control (FRX-11),
causal regret gates (FRX-15), and demo-claim linkage (FRX-16). Updates
include new open items and consolidation of superseded entries.
